series_metadata.series_description: Form No. ADM-7249 and ADM-7250. This record series indicates reimbursement of assigned counsel from various countries with regard to indigent defendants repaying legal fees. Revenue receipts are used to show deposit into the General Revenue Fund. Inclu

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain records in operating area through the current fiscal year plus one fiscal year, then retire to agency storage area until one year after the release of the State Auditor's audit report then destroy, Paper: Shred
